sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60005" key="krinwto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρῐν-ωτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n60005.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">adorned with lilies</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κεφαλίδες</foreign> Aristeas <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg001:68" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">68</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
